## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / infrastructure

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is based on `main` (not pushed directly to `main`)
- [ ] `cargo test` passes locally
- [ ] `wasm-pack build` succeeds locally
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run test` passes
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run e2e` passes (or N/A for non-UI changes)
- [ ] ADR added/updated if this changes architecture decisions
